title: Legacy Clouds
description: A resource pack that brings back the clouds texture prior to 1.21.6
body:
Legacy Clouds is a simple resource pack that brings back the clouds texture prior to 1.21.6. This resource pack is for you if you want your gameplay to feel more nostalgic!

## Version format
Take this for example: **63.0**

**63** is the latest supported Minecraft's resource pack version. You can view it by looking at [this version.](https://misode.github.io/versions/?id=1.21.6-pre3)

**0** is the patch number where there is an update for the resource pack, but Minecraft's resource pack version doesn't change.

Usually, no matter the resource pack version, the minimum resource pack version will be **62**, equivalent to **25w21a**, the version where the clouds texture was changed.
